code: import httpClient from"./httpClient";const unwrapData=response=>response&&Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(response,"data")?response.data:response;export const customersApi={getAll:async()=>{const res=await httpClient.get("/customers");return unwrapData(res.data);},create:async customer=>{const res=await httpClient.post("/customers",customer);return unwrapData(res.data);}};
